articles.title: Pregnant Calli Hauger Thackery finishes Boston Marathon through pain as US runner shares powerful moment
articles.description: Calli Hauger-Thackery and a US runner completed the Boston Marathon while pregnant, showing strength and determination. Hauger-Thackery faced pain but finished strong, while the US runner shared an emotional moment with her sister. Another runner, Jennifer Capone Haberek, ran after battling cancer. Together, their stories made this marathon about courage, not just competition.

articles.title: Lawrence Okolie breaks silence after failed drug test shocks boxing world, Tony Yoka fight now in serious doubt
articles.description: Lawrence Okolie has reacted after failing a pre-fight drug test ahead of his bout with Tony Yoka. He says the result may be linked to treatment for an elbow injury. The fight is now uncertain, with officials reviewing the case. Okolie has promised full cooperation and hopes the investigation will clear his name soon.

articles.title: Toronto Maple Leafs speed up NHL general manager search as Scott White of Dallas Stars emerges leading finalist
articles.description: The Toronto Maple Leafs are pushing up their search for the due process of an NHL general manager, with Dallas Stars assistant general manager Scott White surfacing as one of the top candidates. The expedited schedule implies some kind of urgency with the front office vacancies across the league. Having several capable candidates in the running, Toronto seems to be on the verge of making an important leadership choice that can define its future in competitive terms in the short term.

articles.description: India has outlined a series of anti-doping measures and promised tougher reforms after concerns over its doping record. Top government sources highlighted expanded testing, stronger monitoring of athletes and upcoming legal provisions to criminalise doping.

articles.description: Afreen Khan, a trained physiotherapist, met cricketer Yusuf Pathan professionally. Their bond grew into love, leading to marriage in 2013. The couple now shares a private life with their two children.

articles.title: NFL Trade Rumor: Buffalo Bills could look to strengthen offense with move for $120M San Francisco 49ers star amid injury setbacks
articles.description: The Buffalo Bills have been a force to be reckoned with on the field even as the team ended up losing in the Divisional Round against the Denver Broncos in the last season and against the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC Championship game in the 2024 season. Though these were heartbreaking losses, the Buffalo Bills remain focused on bouncing back on the field as they work on their roster.

articles.title: Delhi HC holds Hockey India, secy general Bhola Nath Singh guilty of contempt
articles.description: The Delhi High Court has found Hockey India and its secretary general guilty of contempt for wilfully disobeying a prior order. Officials were directed to allow Syeed Asima Ali access to executive board meetings but failed to provide necessary links for multiple sessions.
